rules_applied: A: Strip stray wrapping double-quotes — entire NL string opened-and-closed with " when EN had no quotes (translation pipeline artifact).
B: Repair unbalanced quotes — orphan opening or closing " with no matching pair.
decision_status: 11 cells. 9 wrap-strips + 2 unbalanced repairs. Stylistic inline emphasis-quotes (e.g. "Revolutie" sarcasm, "Poepegaatje" bar name) explicitly LEFT INTACT.
